title: Senior Software Engineer - Ola Cabs - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Ola Cabs - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Ola Cabs in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Ola Cabs:
Ola Cabs is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ola Cabs!
